'''layuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanosilylation|cyanosilylation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanosilylation|cyanosilylation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| layuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læyiyith|læyiyith]] || [[word:læyiyij|læyiyij]] || [[word:læyiyish|læyiyish]] || [[word:læyiyi|læyiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:layuyuyuth|layuyuyuth]] || [[word:layuyuyuj|layuyuyuj]] || [[word:layuyuyush|layuyuyush]] || [[word:layuyuyu|layuyuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:layuyuth|layuyuth]] || [[word:layuyuj|layuyuj]] || [[word:layuyush|layuyush]] || [[word:layuyu|layuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:layufyuth|layufyuth]] || [[word:layufyuj|layufyuj]] || [[word:layufyush|layufyush]] || [[word:layufyuf|layufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:layuyuthu|layuyuthu]] || [[word:layuyuju|layuyuju]] || [[word:layuyushu|layuyushu]] || [[word:layuyuku|layuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:layuyuth|layuyuth]] || [[word:layuyuj|layuyuj]] || [[word:layuyush|layuyush]] || [[word:layuyu|layuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:layuyuthul|layuyuthul]] || [[word:layuyujul|layuyujul]] || [[word:layuyushul|layuyushul]] || [[word:layuyukul|layuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:layuyuthuthu|layuyuthuthu]] || [[word:layuyujuju|layuyujuju]] || [[word:layuyushushu|layuyushushu]] || [[word:layuyuku|layuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:layuyuthun|layuyuthun]] || [[word:layuyujun|layuyujun]] || [[word:layuyushun|layuyushun]] || [[word:layuyukun|layuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:layuyuthuoro|layuyuthuoro]] || [[word:layuyujuoro|layuyujuoro]] || [[word:layuyushuoro|layuyushuoro]] || [[word:layuyukuoro|layuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
